Dead Man Floating  

Description

1: Water Breathing (2)
2: See Invisible (1)
3: Levitate (2)
7: Increase Poison Resist by 21 (L41) to 90 (L51)

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 150 Skill: Abjuration
Casting Time: 6 Recast Time: 6
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Range: 100
Location: Any Time of Day: Any
Fizzle Adj: 5 Deletable: Yes
Blockable: Yes Focusable: Yes
Dispellable: Yes Interruptable: Yes
Short Buff Box: No Target Type: Single
Spell Type: Beneficial Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Cast on you: You become like the dead.
Cast on other: Soandso looks dead.
Effect Fades: You return to life.

Game Description

Grants your target the power of the dead, including levitation, increased poison resistance, water breathing, and the ability to see invisible creatures.

Items with this effect

  • Broken Sacrificial Blade
  • Robe of Adversity
  • Robe of Decay
  • Spell: Dead Man Floating
  • Spell: Dead Man Floating

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Dead Man Floating
Spell: Dead Man Floating
ClassLevel
NEC41
Expansion:

Duration:
1 hour(s) 12.0 mins
  • Comments (11)
  • Scroll 2 Sold By (3)
  • Scroll 2 Crafted (1)
  • Screenshots

Merchants:


Abysmal Sea
  • Yiem Rynawu - 22pp 8gp 9sp 8cp

East Freeport
  • Ealyson Roloius - 22pp 8gp 9sp 8cp

The Plane of Knowledge
  • Heretic Elirev - 22pp 8gp 9sp 8cp

# Oct 10 2004 at 3:49 AM Rating: Decent
sunol
Scholar
36 posts
Well after almost a year of collecting runes, pages, and words i went to my bazaar bots and looked for the two words needed, had 16 copies of asylum . 0 copies of agony..went to the bazaar on Xev, only one seller had it for sell, 7300pp..hmm think i'll go to Abysmall sea

Hi all,

This spell can be buy on Abysmal Sea from Yiem Rynawu for 20 pp (loc -158, -203, +102)

Edited, Tue Mar 16 20:37:19 2004

Researched
QuoteReply
# Feb 29 2004 at 11:36 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591775161694
View User Forum
62 posts
Research Items needed:

Words of Agony, Words of Asylum, Parchment & Quill. By level 44 you should have your advanced Research book. May darkness be with you...

Forgivin Synz, Necromancer
Aurora Spirits of Prexus

Edited, Sun Feb 29 11:41:36 2004
▲ Page top
RE: Researched
QuoteReply
# Mar 24 2005 at 10:32 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592266080663
140 posts
Sheesh I come around here to see if this spell is research only so I know whether or not to sell the words and what do I see? The wrong recipe LOL.

Dead Man Floating (L44 nec) Trivial at 162.
Single target.
-words of the psyche
-words of burnishing

Dead Man Floating (L49 nec) Trivial at 176.
Group version.
-words of asylum
-words of agony
-a piece of parchment
-a quill


You can tell that Unnforgiven Defender of Justice's recipe is wrong because a level 44 spell does not use a quill and parchment.

Edit: Don't think you can get your advanced research book until level 51 either. Could be wrong though.

Edited, Thu Mar 24 22:32:38 2005
▲ Page top
Hmmm
QuoteReply

# Oct 05 2003 at 5:23 PM Rating: Decent
Woofie
Sage
90 posts
this spell, ive found out so far, doesnt work in Crypt of Nadox, nor Dulak. it works in gunthak though.

just found a reason from a guildy though
any zone you cant cast levitate in, you cant use DMF in.
really sucks when you cant get the see invis and water breathing part
